## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the skill content gets wrong.

## What did the agent produce?

Describe or paste the incorrect code or behavior the agent generated
when following the skill.

## What should it have produced?

Describe the correct behavior or code.

## Agora product affected

- [ ] RTC (Web / React / iOS / Android)
- [ ] RTM
- [ ] Conversational AI
- [ ] Server / Token generation
- [ ] Cloud Recording

## Agent and model

- **Coding agent** (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot):
- **Model** (e.g., Claude Sonnet 4.6):
- **MCP server installed?** Yes / No
